nodes.label: ProvKlar UF Brand Logo
nodes.description: ProvKlar UF logo on white background. Icon: open book in dark navy blue with a green checkmark and upward-trending bar chart arrows (blue and green) rising from its pages — symbolising knowledge, progress, and achievement. Wordmark: 'ProvKlar' in dark navy bold sans-serif, 'UF' in bright green. Clean flat design aesthetic.
design_decisions: Open book icon communicates education/study as the core product purpose
Upward arrows and bar chart inside book: progress, improvement, exam readiness
Checkmark overlay: correctness, validation, passing tests
Navy + green palette: trustworthy/academic (navy) paired with growth/success (green)
Flat vector style — scalable, modern, approachable for student audience
UF suffix in green differentiates it as a UF (Ungdomsforetag / youth enterprise) brand
nodes.typography_style: bold sans-serif, high contrast between brand name and UF suffix
nodes.brand_purpose: exam preparation / study platform for Swedish students (UF = youth enterprise)
